failure_taxonomy.description: Verifies that the AndroidManifest.xml application package name, Kotlin namespace, Gradle namespace, and applicationId are aligned to prevent automatic keep-rule generation failures caused by manifest package mismatch.
Confirms that the declared Application class (com.inscopelabs.abxmcp.McpApplication) is physically present in the final base DEX bytecode of the built artifact.
Compares classes declared in the AndroidManifest against ProGuard rules and AGP auto-keep rules (aapt_rules.txt), verifying that all manifest components are retained in full and mapped correctly.
Verifies that MultiDex is correctly configured when minSdk < 21, ensuring the primary DEX does not exceed limit or miss classes during start up.
Ensures that first-launch critical assets, classes, and initialization sequences remain strictly in the base APK rather than a deferred dynamic split bundle.
Performs a structural and class-level diff of release vs. debug builds to identify resources or classes that are present in debug but stripped or missing in release.
